title: lathyrus bauhini
intro: Lathyrus bauhini, also known as Everlasting Pea or Bauhin's Pea, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help alleviate pain, reduce fever, and combat infection. The plant is used for its health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive disorders, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus bauhini is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in infusions, capsules, or as a powder for added convenience.
